description_long: This is a modern, high-roof van with a streamlined, utilitarian design, featuring a predominantly white exterior with black trim and accents. The front showcases a large windshield, compact headlights, and a prominent grille with a circular emblem. The sides have elongated, tinted windows and minimalistic door handles, suggesting a passenger or cargo configuration. The rear is equipped with large, vertically oriented tail lights and a wide rear window, indicating ample cargo or passenger space. The wheels are robust and set within slightly flared wheel arches, suitable for urban and suburban environments. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, typical of vehicles used for transport or delivery in city settings.
description: A white, high-roof van with black trim, large windows, and a modern, utilitarian design, suitable for urban transport or delivery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large windshield, compact headlights, grille, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated windows, sliding side door, and two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide rear window, vertical tail lights, and rear door seam.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible windows and wheels, but no sliding door handle visible.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
